name: Dinosaur Kids' Tent - Pillowfort™: Polyester Play Tent for Toddlers, Fiberglass Frame, Easy Assembly, 3+ Years
description:
Your kiddo will love spending hours inside this Dinosaur Tent from Pillowfort™. Set on a fiberglass frame, this kids A-frame tent features a fabric cover with a circular cutout on the side for a fun window they can leave open or closed, while the solid base offers them a soft spot to sit, play or read. Plus, this play tent is designed with a large front entrance for easy entry and exit, while the ties at the front allow them to keep it shut for more privacy while they enjoy a book or play with toys. Featuring a conical silhouette, this kids play tent is adorned with allover colorful dinosaur and plant prints to bring fun flair to their bedroom or playroom.

Overall Width: 52 inches
Overall Height: 60 inches
Overall Depth: 52 inches
Door Height: 46 inches
Door Width: 52 inches
Window Height: 16.75 inches
Window Width: 16.75 inches
